series_metadata.series_description: Requisitions, mailing lists, specifications, copies of the bid package, copy of bid labels, all original bids, draft copies, bid tabulation, purchase order or blanket order, green book (special provisions and general terms and conditions, bid forms, etc.), wage rate book and plan holder list. May include, if applicable, drawings, delivery requests, correspondence, catalogs/literature.

retention_rules.disposition: Paper: Retain 8 years after end of applicable warranty period, Paper: Shred
